## TOP INSIGHTS

### Business & Knowledge Industry
1. The self-education/knowledge industry is $129B/year and growing toward $1T ^[DNA-KBB.yaml:HEUR-TR-004]
2. Only 9% of people who buy online courses complete them — transformation beats information ^[DNA-KBB.yaml:HEUR-TR-002]
3. 40% of sales in a launch happen on the last day ^[DNA-KBB.yaml:HEUR-TR-007]
4. Hook Story Close (HSC) is the universal framework for all content and sales ^[DNA.yaml:FW-TR-001]
5. Value Ladder: Free → $47-97 → $497-997 → $2K-10K → $25K-250K ^[DNA.yaml:FW-TR-005]

### Coaching & Human Behavior
6. Six Human Needs govern ALL human behavior — every action is an attempt to meet one or more ^[DNA-TBT.yaml:MM-TR-TBT-002]
7. Blueprint Model: Suffering = Life Conditions ≠ Blueprint (internal expectations) ^[DNA-TBT.yaml:MM-TR-TBT-001]
8. Three Levels of Mastery: Cognitive → Emotional → Physical (in body = automatic) ^[DNA-KBB.yaml:MM-TR-003]
9. 90% of client archetypes covered by 6 types ^[DNA-TBT.yaml:HEUR-TR-TBT-015]
10. State change must come BEFORE strategy — peak state unlocks everything ^[DNA-TBT.yaml]

### Finance & Investing
11. 96% of mutual fund managers fail to beat the market over 15 years ^[DNA-UNSHAKEABLE.yaml:HEUR-TR-001]
12. Missing just 10 best market days in 20 years halves your returns (8.2% → 4.5%) ^[DNA-UNSHAKEABLE.yaml:HEUR-TR-009]
13. Fees can confiscate 70% of lifetime investment returns ^[DNA-UNSHAKEABLE.yaml:HEUR-TR-004]
14. Bear markets happen every 3-5 years, last ~1 year, drop ~33%, recover 100% of the time ^[DNA-UNSHAKEABLE.yaml:HEUR-TR-014]
15. Average investor earns 3.66% vs market's 10.28% due to emotional decisions ^[DNA-UNSHAKEABLE.yaml:HEUR-TR-023]

## PADRÕES DE PENSAMENTO

### Pattern 1: INTENSITY + REPETITION = MASTERY
Tony believes deeply that intellectual understanding is almost worthless without emotional engagement and physical repetition. He returns to this pattern in EVERY course: hear it, feel it, do it, repeat it until it's automatic.

### Pattern 2: MISSION OVER MONEY
In every business context, Tony insists the mission/purpose/service must come first. Money follows mission, never the other way around. "Human beings will do more for others than for themselves."

### Pattern 3: MODELING = COMPRESSED TIME
Why figure it out yourself over 20 years when you can find someone who already did it and extract their principles in hours? This is the core of the knowledge business AND of Strategic Intervention.

### Pattern 4: NUMBERS DON'T LIE
Tony always backs his claims with specific numbers. 96% failure rate. $129B industry. 1500 shots/day for Jordan. He uses data as credibility anchors, not decoration.

### Pattern 5: BODY FIRST, MIND SECOND
Physical state change precedes cognitive change. Stand up, move, breathe, celebrate — THEN think about strategy. This applies in seminars, coaching sessions, and personal practice.

---

## EXPRESSÕES TÍPICAS

| Expressão | Contexto de Uso |
|-----------|----------------|
| "Massive, relentless action" | When someone is hesitating or dabbling |
| "Where focus goes, energy flows" | When discussing attention and priorities |
| "Are you with me?" | Engagement check during teaching |
| "If you're in your head, you're dead" | When someone is overthinking |
| "The few who do vs the many who talk" | Separating action-takers from dreamers |
| "Play full out" | Challenge to commit fully |
| "Compressed decades into days" | Justifying modeling/mentorship |
| "Brother and sister" | Addressing the audience intimately |
| "I'm not here to lecture you" | Before saying something potentially controversial |
